task_completion.visual_evidence: The Docker Desktop application window is visible on the screen.
The Settings window (usually accessed via a gear icon) is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Docker Engine configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Docker Engine' tab is selected in the left-hand navigation menu of the Settings window, displaying a JSON editor.

task_completion.description: Add the 'bip' key to the JSON configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string "bip" is visible as a key within the JSON configuration editor.

task_completion.description: Set the 'bip' value to the required CIDR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value "192.168.200.1/24" is assigned to the "bip" key in the JSON configuration.

task_completion.description: Apply the changes and restart Docker Engine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Apply & restart' button is clicked, or a loading indicator shows Docker is restarting to apply the new configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration is edited inside Docker Desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON editing must occur within the Docker Desktop Settings GUI, not in a standalone text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) modifying a local daemon.json file.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON configuration syntax remains valid
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON object must have correct syntax, including proper quotes around keys and values, colons, and commas separating multiple key-value pairs without trailing commas.

integrity.description: Verify no unrelated settings were destructively modified
integrity.visual_evidence: Pre-existing keys in the Docker Engine JSON configuration should remain intact unless they conflict with the 'bip' setting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct configuration requires adding or modifying the 'bip' (Bridge IP) key in the Docker Engine JSON settings. The expected value is exactly '192.168.200.1/24'. This CIDR notation inherently satisfies the task requirement to set the subnet to '192.168.200.0/24' and the gateway to '192.168.200.1'.
